synopsis: After escaping Jedi Master Yoda, Count Dooku and General Grievous have traveled to Kamino to start experimenting with creating a Sith clone army. Dooku approaches a pair of Clone troopers guarding a cloning chamber and use the Force to knock members unconscious. Meanwhile at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, Yoda senses a disturbance in the Force while teaching the Padawans how to handle a rancor.
title: Who Let the Clones Out
